The galactic robotics company, CyberMaid-Industries, is back with another insidious scheme. All across the Galaxies, a chain of "combat" gyms are available on moon-based Holiday resorts. These gyms are open to participants of any kind - Heroes, Villains and everyone in-between are welcome, but there is a catch.

CyberMaid-Industries have developed technology which can harness sexual bodily fluids as an energy source used to power robot armies, technology, and other evil schemes. These gyms are an employed method of participant extraction, utilizing the gym's sightly "combat" robots.
